title: Finding HOME
lyrics: So much to say, thought you'd go into a train This is the reason my life's this way It's not about the carpet or the pave Out having you relate, how I sedate My lows and highs, forcing you to body sway Hook them in ties, take the bait Broke the I.T., just can't wait Looks so nice in my situation Churn, rock your bed cold, you drunk Take a fuzzy seat, listen to my beat It's fucked up, it's tame And alive, you are my librarian La-ba-la, don't get the snooze You know who gets hit, then you're just gon' lose I can stand up and dance to this groove Open the tab and dunk down their booze Another person plays on, thanks to our views Camotrain Muse blew up by the news There's more to display, I need to choose Today is the day, I stop for real clues My first impressions, I don't care who you are Gon' let loose, let loose My first impressions, let me sit back and stare When I let loose, let loose Yeah, turn up pretty when I spit on a mic on the stage Yeah, let loose, let loose First impressions, I don't care who you are Let loose, let loose From battles to troops, stomping in with our boots We gon' let loose, get cold, get fused Let you know we talking bout When we up in the face, yeah, it's word of mouth Tools on AZ, and we bring the drought Shutting competition, leaving Barrett in out My first impressions, what I get when I measure Crease down from the toe to the brim of the hat Now you know who this be, B-L-U-E Down with the Crips and the Bloods, you see Never had to claim, cause they down with me The first impressions, what you get, man? It's good up on my balls, man Woo! Woo! Woo!              Woo!               Woo!
